body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35357", "cvss": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "The cp utility in uutils coreutils is vulnerable to an information disclosure race condition. Destination files are initially created with umask-derived permissions (e.g., 0644) before being restricted to their final mode (e.g., 0600) later in the process. A local attacker can race to open the file during this window; once obtained, the file descriptor remains valid and readable even after the permissions are tightened, exposing sensitive or private file contents.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00091, "percentile": 0.00621}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2m8x-mvfx-gwgj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:12:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2m8x-mvfx-gwgj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2m8x-mvfx-gwgj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35357"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35357", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/10011", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2m8x-mvfx-gwgj"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-30T17:12:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2m8x-mvfx-gwgj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
